description:
This quiz tests intermediate JavaScript developers on their proficiency with the native `Date` class, emphasizing its complex API, date manipulation techniques, and alternatives to third-party libraries. It has a playful yet challenging tone, using humor to highlight common frustrations while aiming to deepen core language knowledge.
Topics: JavaScript Date class, Date manipulation, Native API usage, Localization, Common pitfalls
Audience: JavaScript developers with intermediate experience seeking to improve their understanding of built-in date handling capabilities
